text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and the atmosphere is
electric with excitement as students happily
exchange chocolates with each other.
Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Teach. I'm comin' in!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, considering what day it is, there's only one
thing I could be here for!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: So, take this! Thanks for everything, Teach!

I unwrap and open the box she gives me to find a
collection of beautiful chocolates of various
shapes and sizes.

I can't help but wonder where she bought them
from, but when I ask her out of curiosity...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, I made them.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
They're a real hit back at the dorm. Guess I've
gotten better at making 'em over the years.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I had a pretty tough time makin' the rose-shaped
ones last year, but I pulled through this time
around.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And this one is... well, a chocolate portrait of the
two of us!

She points to the chocolate in question, and when
I look at it, I see that it really does bear a striking
resemblance to us.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Doesn't it just? I had to use a bunch of
tiny chisels to make it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Fuji told me she didn't even realize it was made of
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, not that that matters or anything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna love how the chocolates taste,
guaranteed! If you're ever feelin' tired, you can
have a nibble on 'em to fuel yourself up.

Before I dig into the box, I make sure to get a
good photo of the gorgeous chocolates.

I unwrap and open the box she gave me to find a
chocolate gateau garnished with whipped cream
inside.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Have a taste, Teach!

I take a bite and am rewarded with the cake's
smooth, moist texture. The bottom layer of the
slice is crammed with crunchy walnuts.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Great. Hehe. I'm glad to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You'd never guess it, but this is actually my
special healthy chocolate gateau! It's low in sugar
and fat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I used tofu instead of fresh cream and a sugar
substitute instead of cane sugar. I caramelized
the walnuts in maple syrup too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate is surprisingly calorie dense, so I
thought it'd be better to make it healthier.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm just relieved that you find it tasty.
Phew...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What? Hm... Well, I was just wondering why I feel
relieved in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Normally when people say they enjoy my food, I
just want them to eat as much as they'd like, but
right now I...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Hmmm?! What the heck's going on with
me?!

Her sudden personal crisis aside, it's clear how
much work she put into making a cake for me,
and my heart warms at the thought.
choice_data_list: Why don't we have this together?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What? Why? I made that for you to eat.
choice_data_list: But I want to eat it together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Th-the heck? You're kinda pushy today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess it wouldn't be so bad to eat
together once in a while. I'll go make us some
coffee.

We enjoy an elegant break with some warm,
freshly-brewed coffee and delicious cake.
